content.text:
## 🔍 COMPREHENSIVE DIAGNOSIS: Planning Page Scrolling Issue I've identified the **ROOT CAUSE** of why the scrolling fix didn't work. Here's the complete analysis: --- ## **PROBLEM IDENTIFIED** ### **Critical Structure Error in Calendar.tsx (Lines 333-408)** The Calendar component has a **malformed HTML structure**: ```typescript return (
{/* Calendar Navigation - FROZEN */}
{/* Navigation buttons */}
// ← CLOSES TOO EARLY (line 404) {/* Calendar Grid - SCROLLABLE */}
// ← OUTSIDE parent flex container! {/* Views */}
); ``` **The closing `` on line 404 closes the entire `calendar-widget` container prematurely!** This means: - ✅ Navigation wrapper exists (lines 336-404) - ❌ **Scrollable grid wrapper is OUTSIDE the flex container** (line 407+) - ❌ The two sections are NOT siblings in a flex layout - ❌ The flex layout (`h-full flex flex-col`) has NO EFFECT --- ## **COMPONENT HIERARCHY (Current - BROKEN)** ``` Planning.tsx └──
├──

Planning & Calendar

← Page header (scrolls) └── └── Widget (draggable={false}) └── Widget content area (overflow-auto from Widget.tsx line 56) ├──
│ └──
← Navigation (frozen) │ └──
...
│
← CLOSES calendar-widget TOO EARLY! │ └──
← ORPHANED (outside flex) └── MonthView/WeekView/etc ``` **Result:** The grid wrapper is outside the flex container, so `flex-1` and `overflow-y-auto` have no effect. The Widget's `overflow-auto` (line 56) controls scrolling instead, causing the entire Calendar to scroll including navigation. --- ## **WHY THE FIX DIDN'T WORK** 1. **Widget.tsx Line 56** - The Widget component wraps all children in `
`: - This creates scrolling at the Widget level - Our inner `overflow-y-auto` on line 407 is ignored because parent already handles scroll 2. **Malformed HTML** - Line 404 closes the flex container prematurely: - Navigation and grid are NOT siblings - Flex layout doesn't apply - Grid wrapper is orphaned outside the flex system 3. **Planning Page Structure** - Planning.tsx has: - Page header OUTSIDE Calendar widget (lines 26-33) - This header scrolls with the Calendar - User expects header to be frozen too --- ## **THE REAL ISSUES** ### **Issue #1: Broken Flex Container (Calendar.tsx)** - **Location:** Lines 333-478 - **Problem:** Closing `
` on line 404 is premature - **Impact:** Flex layout broken, scrolling handled by Widget instead ### **Issue #2: Widget's Default Overflow (Widget.tsx)** - **Location:** Line 56 - **Problem:** `overflow-auto` applies to ALL widget content - **Impact:** Prevents children from controlling their own scroll behavior ### **Issue #3: Page Header Scrolls (Planning.tsx)** - **Location:** Lines 26-33 - **Problem:** "Planning & Calendar" header is outside Widget - **Impact:** Header scrolls with page, not frozen like navigation --- ## **REQUIRED FIXES** ### **Fix #1: Correct Calendar.tsx HTML Structure** **Current (lines 333-408):** ```typescript
{/* Navigation - FROZEN */}
{/* Nav buttons */}
// ← WRONG! Closes calendar-widget too early {/* Grid - SCROLLABLE */}
// ← Orphaned! ``` **Required:** ```typescript
{/* Navigation - FROZEN */}
{/* Nav buttons */}
{/* Grid - SCROLLABLE */}
{viewMode === 'monthly' ? : ...}
// ← CORRECT! Closes after both sections ``` **Changes:** - Remove closing `
` on line 404 - Move closing `
` to after the grid wrapper (currently line 477) - Make navigation and grid siblings inside the flex container --- ### **Fix #2: Remove Widget's Default Overflow** **Current (Widget.tsx line 56):** ```typescript
{children}
``` **Required:** ```typescript
{children}
``` **Why:** Using `overflow-hidden` allows children to control their own scroll behavior via `overflow-y-auto` on specific sections. --- ### **Fix #3: Move Planning Page Header Inside Widget** **Current (Planning.tsx lines 24-39):** ```typescript

Planning & Calendar

Manage your schedule...

}>
``` **Required:** Either: 1. **Remove the page header** (Calendar widget already has title) 2. **Or** make it sticky/frozen separately **Recommended:** Remove it since the Widget title already says "Calendar" (duplicative). --- ## **COMPLETE COMPONENT HIERARCHY (After Fixes)** ``` Planning.tsx └──
└── └── Widget (draggable={false}) └──
← Widget content (no scroll) └──
← Flex container ├──
← Navigation (frozen) │ └── Nav buttons │ └──
← Grid (scrolls) └── MonthView/WeekView/etc ``` **Result:** - ✅ Navigation frozen at top - ✅ Grid scrolls independently - ✅ Flex layout works correctly - ✅ No page header to scroll --- ## **SUMMARY** | Issue | Location | Root Cause | Fix | |-------|----------|-----------|-----| | **Broken flex layout** | Calendar.tsx:404 | Premature closing `
` | Move `
` to line 477 | | **Widget scroll conflict** | Widget.tsx:56 | `overflow-auto` on all children | Change to `overflow-hidden` | | **Page header scrolls** | Planning.tsx:26-33 | Header outside Widget | Remove header (duplicative) | **Files to modify:** 1. `src/widgets/Calendar.tsx` - Fix HTML structure (remove line 404, add closing div after line 476) 2. `src/components/Widget.tsx` - Change `overflow-auto` to `overflow-hidden` (line 56) 3. `src/pages/Planning.tsx` - Remove page header (lines 26-33) The fix is **surgical and minimal** - just 3 lines of code changes across 3 files. Once applied, the Calendar navigation will be frozen and the grid will scroll independently as intended.
